title: CreditCalibrationInputs
description: All inputs the credit factor calibrator needs for a single calibration run. Canonical Rust type: finstack_valuations::factor_model::CreditCalibrationInputs (in credit_calibration.rs).

as_of.description: Calibration anchor date. Must appear in history_panel.dates.

asof_spreads.description: Issuer spreads at as_of in level space. Keys are issuer IDs.

idiosyncratic_overrides.description: Optional caller-supplied idiosyncratic vol overrides keyed by issuer ID. Empty map for PR-4; peer-proxy fallback chain deferred.

HistoryPanel.title: HistoryPanel
HistoryPanel.description: Sparse issuer-spread history aligned to a sorted date grid.

spreads.description: Per-issuer spread series aligned with dates. Each array has length dates.length; entries are number or null.

IssuerTagPanel.title: IssuerTagPanel
IssuerTagPanel.description: Point-in-time issuer tags at the calibration as_of date.

tags.description: Tag map keyed by issuer ID. Each value is a map of dimension-name to tag-value.

GenericFactorSpec.title: GenericFactorSpec
GenericFactorSpec.description: Reference to the generic (PC) time series used as the first factor.

name.description: Human-readable name for the generic factor (e.g. CDX IG 5Y).

series_id.description: Caller's time-series identifier used to look up the input data.

GenericFactorSeries.title: GenericFactorSeries
GenericFactorSeries.description: Generic (PC) factor reference and aligned values.

values.description: Generic factor values aligned with HistoryPanel.dates.
